يا رب ارحم عبدك الخاطي / سمعان ابن يوسف غفر / الله له ولوالديه امين
full_text_tesim: Euchologion and Songs and Readings of Ordinary Days
O Lord, have mercy on your sinner servant Samʻān ibn Yūsuf, may God forgive him and his parents. Amen!
